candidate.completion: lower my standards before my self-esteem does it for me.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please lower my standards before my self-esteem does it for me.

evaluation.rationale: A clear reversal turns loneliness into a plea to be spared the self-lowering logic of damaged self-esteem. The idea is fresh and humanly recognizable, but the phrasing is a bit long and the finish lacks the clean snap of stronger wit.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
